title: Proclamation No. 91, s. 1963
text:
MALACAÑANG

RESIDENCE OF THE PRESIDENT OF THE PHILIPPINES MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 91

EXCLUDING FROM THE OPERATION OF PROCLAMATION NO. 335, DATED SEPTEMBER 12, 1930, WHICH ESTABLISHED THE MARKET SITE RESERVATION SITUATED IN TACLOBAN CITY, ISLAND OF LEYTE, CERTAIN PORTIONS OF LAND EMBRACED THEREIN AND DECLARING THE SAME OPEN TO DISPOSITION UNDER THE PROVISIONS OF THE PUBLIC LAND ACT

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Natural Resources and pursuant to the authority vested in me by law, I, Diosdado Macapagal, President of the Philippines, do hereby exclude from the operation of Proclamation No. 335, dated September 12, 1930, which established the market site reservation situated in Tacloban City, Island of Leyte, certain portions of land embraced therein, and declare the same open to disposition under the provisions of the Public Land Act, which portions of land are more particularly described as follows, to wit:

Lot 143-A-2-A-1-C, Swo-40522 (Claimed by Melecio Tan)

A parcel of land (Lot 143-A-2-A-1-C of the subdivision plan Swo-40522, being a portion of Lot 143-A-2-A-1 described on plan Mr-1’71 Amd., L.R.C. Cad. Record No.‑‑‑‑‑), situated in the City of Tacloban. Bounded on the SE., along line 1-2 by Lot 196-B of plan (LRC) Psd-15678; on the SW., along line 2-3 by Lot 8-A of the subdivision plan; on the NW., along line 3-4 by Lot 143—A-2-A-1-D of the subdivision plan? and on the NE., along line 4-1 by Lot 143-A-2-A-1-A of the subdivision plan. Beginning at a point marked 1 on plan, being N. 56° 19′ W., 002.70 meters from B.L.L.M. 1, Tacloban Cadastre; thence S. 41° 48′ W., 4.8:2 meters to point 2; thence N. 63° 27′ W., 5.93 meters to point 3; thence N. 15° 18′ E., 3.46 meters to point 4; thence S. 72° 28′ E., 7.97 meters to the point of beginning; containing an area of 28 square meters. All points referred to are indicated on the plan and are ma rked on the ground as follows: point 1 by Old P.S. Cyl. Conc. Mon.; point 2 by Old B.L. Cyl. Conc. Mon; and the rest by P.S.. Cyl, Conc, Mons; bearings true; date of the original survey, Oct. 26-30, 1911 and that of the subdivision survey, January 10-12, 1962. Approved April 3, 1962.

Lot 143-A-2-A-1-B, Swo-40522 (Claimed by Melecio Tan)

A parcel of land (Lot 143-A-2-A-1-B of the subdivision plan Swo-40522, being a portion of Lot 143-A-2-A-1 described on plan Mr-171 Amd., L.R.C. Cad. Record No.‑‑‑‑‑) situated in the City of Tacloban. Bounded on the SW., along line 1-2 by Lot 196-B of plan (LEG) Psd-15678; on the N., and NW., along lines 2-3-4 by Lot 143-A-2-A-1-A of the subdivision plan; on the N., along line 4-5 by Lot 143-A-2-A-1-D of the subdivision plan; and on the SE., along line 5-1 by Lot 143-A-2-B of plan , Mr-171 Amd. Beginning at a point marked 1 on plan, being N. 64° 43′ W., 640.42 meters from B.L.L.M. 1, Tacloban Cad., thence N. 42° 08′ W., 4.00 meters to point 2; thence S. 69° 02′ E., 1.93 , meters to point 3; thence N. 19° 04′ E., 6.25 meters to point 4; thence S. 73° 25′ E., 5.01 meters to point 5; thence S. 41° ’24’ W., 9.00 meters to the point of beginning; containing an area of 27 square meters. All points referred to are indicated on the plan and are marked on the ground as follows: point 1 by Old B.L. Cyl. Conc. Mon.; point 2 by Old P.S. Cyl. Conc. Mon.; and the rest, by PS. Cyl. Conc. Mons.; bearings true; date of the original survey, Oct. 26-30, 1911 and that of the subdivision survey, January 10-12, 1962. Approved April 3, 1962.

Lot 143-A-2-A-1-A, Swo-40522 (Claimed by Dominador Gotanchiam)

A parcel of land (Lot 143-A-2-A-1-A of the subdivision plan Swo-40522, being a portion of Lot 143-A-2-A-1 described on plan Mr-171 Amd., L.R.C. Cad. Eecord No.‑‑‑‑‑), situated in the City of Tacloban. Bounded on the SE., along line 1-2 by 196-A of plan (LRC) Psd-15678; on the SW., along line 2-3 by Lot 143-A-2-A-1-C of the subdivision plan; on the NW., and NE., along lines 3-4-5-6 by lot 143-A-2-A-1-D of the subdivision plan; on the SE., along line 6-7 by Lot 143-A-2-A-1-D; and along line 7-8 by Lot 143-A-2-A-1-B, both of the subdivision plan; on the SW., along line 8-9 by Lot 143-A-2-A-1-B of the subdivision plan; and on the SW., along line 9-1 by Lot 196-A of plan (LRC) Psd-15678. Beginning at a point marked 1 on plan, being N. 54° 32′ W., 650.12 meters from B.L.L.M. 1, Tacloban Cad., thence S. 41° 48′ W, 20.43 meters to point 2; thence N 72° 28′ W., 7.97 meters to point 3; thence N. 15° 18′ E., 24.00 meters to point 4; thence S. 74° 42′ E., 6.06 meters to point 5; thence S. 74° 57′ E, 18.65 meters to point 6; thence S. 19° 25′ W., 3.31 meters to point 7; thence S. 19° 04′ W., 6.25 meters to point 8; thence N. 69° 02′ W., 1.93 meters to point 9; thence N. 42° 08′ W., 6.01 meters to the point of beginning; containing an area of 391 square meters. All points referred to are indicated on the plan and are mark-on the ground as follows: point 1 by Old B.L. Cyl. Conc, Mons., point 2 and 9 by Old P.S. Cyl. Conc Mons., and the rest, by P.S. Cyl. Conc Mons., bearings true; date of the original survey, Oct. 26-30, 1911 and that of the subdivision survey, January 10-12, 1962. Approved April 3, 1962.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 15th day of March, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and sixty-three.

DIOSDADO MACAPAGAL President of the Philippines

By the President:

SALVADOR L. MARIÑO Executive Secretary

Source: Legislative Library, House of Representatives
